content_of_post_to_answer: Why are there people who quickly lose the sweetness of their character?
answer: People often don't lose their sweetness because they suddenly become worse; they lose the conditions that allowed their softer side to exist. Repeated disappointment, feeling used, carrying unspoken resentment, or constantly needing to defend themselves can make kindness feel unsafe or exhausting. The interesting distinction is between losing goodness and losing openness. Some people still care deeply but stop expressing it freely. Character is not only revealed by how someone acts when life is gentle, but also by what they protect when life has made them guarded.
